creator: katsuyoshi.ohara@gmail.com
text:
migemo.el does not work on emacs 24.3

Fix: 

Fixed version was released and works well on my emacs 24.3.
It  can be gotten from https://github.com/emacs-jp/migemo
How-To-Repeat: Write the following to your ~/.emacs:
(load-library "migemo")
and use C-s with Japanese roman characters.
